# TrackMint

> AI-powered personal finance: automated tracking, gamified goals, and a 24/7 financial coach for India and global users.

TrackMint combines an AI budget planner, automated transaction categorization, goal tracking, and a multi-model AI financial coach (Lumo, GPT, Gemini, Claude) into one premium fintech app. Users can connect bank accounts, import statements, build budgets and goals, and chat with a personalized financial coach.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and how TrackMint works.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro AI, and Elite AI+ plans with feature comparison and FAQ.
- [AI Coach](/coach): Try the AI financial coach in demo mode — persona selection and chat.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Existing users sign in or create an account.
